metadata.name: Facilitate a Risk and Control Self-Assessment (RCSA)

description: An auditor facilitates an RCSA workshop with a business unit to help them identify and assess their own risks and controls.

nodes.task_description: Prepare for the workshop by creating a template for the business unit to use for documenting their risks and controls.

expected_outcome.value: A standardized RCSA template is created.

nodes.task_description: Lead the workshop, guiding the business team through the process of identifying risks in their key processes.

expected_outcome.value: The business team identifies and documents their top 10 operational risks.

nodes.task_description: Use the results of the RCSA to inform the scope of the upcoming audit of that business unit.

expected_outcome.value: The audit plan is updated to focus on the highest-rated risks identified by the business itself.
